info.name: Sports Facility API
info.description:
Koleksi endpoint Sports Facility Management System (Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL).

Base URL: {{base_url}} = http://localhost:3000/api/v1

Alur pakai:
1. Jalankan `npm run dev`.
2. Auth > Register (sekali) lalu Auth > Login. Script otomatis menyimpan accessToken & refreshToken ke variable koleksi.
3. Endpoint ber-auth otomatis memakai Bearer {{token}}.

Publik (tanpa token): Health, Courts (GET), Pricing (GET), Abonemen > Packages.
Admin-only ditandai (admin) — perlu login akun ber-role admin/superadmin.

request.description: Slot per jam. `booking_type` & `with_light` HANYA berpengaruh untuk lapangan TENIS (harga dari tennis_prices: insidentil/abonemen x lampu). Padel mengabaikannya (off-peak by jam). Nilai with_light harus persis "true" atau "false".

item.name: Court Availability — Tenis abonemen tanpa lampu

request.description: Set {{court_id}} ke lapangan TENIS. Harga slot jadi Rp145.000 (dicoret dari Rp155.000).

body.raw:
{
  "package_id": "{{package_id}}",
  "full_name": "Rifky Alan",
  "phone": "081234567890",
  "communication_email": "rifky@gmail.com",
  "notes": "Mohon dihubungi via email untuk invoice"
}

request.description: Semua booking lintas-user. scope=all hanya dihormati untuk admin.

item.name: Events
item.description: Katalog & registrasi event. Publik: list, detail, kategori. Ber-auth: register, my, cancel.

item.name: Admin · Events
item.description: Kelola event & kategori (role admin/superadmin). Check-in QR: staff/admin.

item.name: Waiting List
item.description: Antrean slot court penuh (padel & tennis). Join hanya jika slot memang sudah dibooking; slot kosong -> 422. Set court_id via Courts > List, dan preferred_date/start/end ke slot yang sudah booked.
